headlines.description: — As soon as Roquan Smith saw the ball tipped at the line, he knew what he had to do.
headlines.shortLinkText: Smith INT sets up game-ending FG as Bears beat Texans 23-20

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans finally have their first victory this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans never trail in keeping Raiders winless with 24-22 win

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Matt Ryan kept the faith Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan drives Colts to 1st win with 20-17 comeback vs Chiefs

headlines.description: — Thomas Morstead stepped into the middle of Miami's end zone, swung his powerful right leg and booted a punt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins halt Allen, survive 'butt punt' to beat Bills

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings have been trying to craft under new coach Kevin O'Connell a diverse and unpredictable offense that can still succeed when their best players are taken away.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings rally past Lions 28-24 on Osborn's last-minute TD

events.name: Baltimore Ravens at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson has spent his career doing things nobody in the NFL has ever done.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson accounts for 5 TDs, Ravens hold off Patriots 37-26

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow played it cool all week, urging Bengals fans to not panic.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow leads Bengals to 1st win of season, 27-12 over Jets

headlines.description: — DeVonta Smith had a simple mentality when Jalen Hurts threw him the ball in coverage.
headlines.shortLinkText: DeVonta for the victory: Smith stars as Eagles stay unbeaten

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Laviska Shenault was frustrated over being declared inactive for his first two games with the Carolina Panthers after being acquired in a late preseason trade from the Jacksonville Jaguars.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panthers defeat Saints 22-14 to snap 9-game losing streak

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — With a scoop and score that will go down in franchise lore, Josh Allen may have put an end to the chaos and disappointment that has defined the Jacksonville Jaguars for the better part of the past decade.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jags return fumble for TD, beat Titans for AFC South title

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Arizona Cardinals

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams defense survived quite an onslaught on Sunday afternoon, defending 58 passing plays from Arizona's Kyler Murray, who is notoriously hard to defend because of his ability to throw and run.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams continue dominance of Cardinals with 20-12 victory

headlines.description: — After more than a week away from home, Cordarrelle Patterson wasn’t about to head back to Atlanta as one of two winless teams in the NFL.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cordarrelle Patterson rumbles Falcons past Seahawks 27-23

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers and the Green Bay Packers did just enough to beat Tom Brady and the short-handed Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers throws for 2 TDs, Packers hold off Brady, Bucs 14-12

headlines.description: — Nine three-and-outs. No touchdown passes. Only 126 yards passing. It was one of the ugliest games of Russell Wilson's storied career.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos, Wilson edge Niners, Garoppolo 11-10 in prime time
